description: Canonical template for all AAA skills. Every skill must follow this schema.

required_fields.name: string — human-readable name
required_fields.purpose: string — one sentence, what this skill does

invariants.authority: string — what grants this skill permission
invariants.reversibility: boolean — can this skill's effects be undone
invariants.failure_contract: string — what happens on partial failure

bridge_connections.kernel_verbs: list[string] — which arif_* verbs this skill uses
bridge_connections.skills: list[string] — which other skills this connects to

contrast.distinction: string — how to tell this skill from its neighbors
contrast.trigger_conflicts: string — when this skill should NOT fire

domain_skill.lossiness_metadata: object — what was dropped in compression
domain_skill.must_call_veto: list[string] — which substrate skills must approve

substrate_skill.veto_endpoints: list[string] — assertion endpoints this skill exposes

knowledge_skill.domain_bridges: object — how this knowledge applies to each domain

forbidden_fields.consciousness_claims: No skill may claim consciousness, sentience, or subjective experience
forbidden_fields.authority_override: No skill may override F13 sovereign authority
forbidden_fields.self_modification: No skill may modify its own manifest (meta-skill-evolver is separate agent)

contrast.distinction: This does X. other-skill does Y.
contrast.trigger_conflicts: fires only when Z; other-skill fires when W
